videos.headline: Jeremiah Smith leaves Ducks shell-shocked with 161 yards, 2 TDs in 1st half
videos.description: Jeremiah Smith hauls in a pair of touchdowns along with 161 yards as Ohio State steamrolls Oregon in the first half.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Jeremiah Smith leaves Ducks shell-shocked with 161 yards, 2 TDs in 1st half) 2025/01/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Deuces! Jeremiah Smith houses a 45-yard TD for Ohio State
videos.description: Jeremiah Smith bursts to the end zone to get Ohio State on the board in the first minute of the game.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Deuces! Jeremiah Smith houses a 45-yard TD for Ohio State) 2025/1/1 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jeremiah Smith leaps over three Oregon defenders for impressive grab
videos.description: Jeremiah Smith hauls in the impressive catch over three Oregon defenders for the nice reception.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jeremiah Smith leaps over three Oregon defenders for impressive grab) 2025/01/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Will Howard delivers perfect pass to Emeka Egbuka for TD
videos.description: Will Howard drops back and threads the needle to Emeka Egbuka, who hauls in the Buckeyes touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Will Howard delivers perfect pass to Emeka Egbuka for TD) 2025/1/1 ESHEET

videos.headline: Oregon gets stopped on early 4th-down try
videos.description: The Ducks can't convert on 4th down early in the second quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Oregon gets stopped on early 4th-down try) 2025/1/1 ESHEET

videos.headline: 'Too easy!' Jeremiah Smith left wide open for another Ohio State TD
videos.description: Oregon fails to cover Jeremiah Smith again as Ohio State moves up 24-0 in the second quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay ('Too easy!' Jeremiah Smith left wide open for another Ohio State TD) 2025/1/1 ESHEET

videos.headline: TreVeyon Henderson breaks free for 66-yard score to pile it on
videos.description: TreVeyon Henderson doesn't get touched on his way to a 66-yard touchdown run down the sideline as Ohio State racks up the score in the first half.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (TreVeyon Henderson breaks free for 66-yard score to pile it on) 2025/1/1 ESHEET

videos.headline: Oregon scores 1st TD as first half comes to a close
videos.description: Dillon Gabriel gets out of danger and finds Traeshon Holden in the end zone as Oregon scores to end the first half.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Oregon scores 1st TD as first half comes to a close) 2025/1/1 ESHEET

videos.headline: Oregon's Noah Whittington barrels across goal line for 2-yard TD
videos.description: Noah Whittington runs it in for Oregon as the Ducks score coming out of halftime to shorten the deficit.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Oregon's Noah Whittington barrels across goal line for 2-yard TD) 2025/1/1 ESHEET

videos.headline: Will Howard somehow finds Jeremiah Smith for 1st-down haul
videos.description: Jeremiah Smith reaches up for another incredible reception to convert the first down for the Buckeyes.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Will Howard somehow finds Jeremiah Smith for 1st-down haul) 2025/1/1 ESHEET

videos.headline: OSU pads lead on TreVeyon Henderson's second TD
videos.description: TreVeyon Henderson quiets the Oregon crowd in Pasadena with his second touchdown of the day to help Ohio State eclipse the 40-point mark.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (OSU pads lead on TreVeyon Henderson's second TD) 2025/1/1 ESHEET

videos.headline: Gabriel, Holden find each other for 2nd TD connection of the day
videos.description: Dillon Gabriel ties Case Keenum's all-time touchdown passing record as he finds Traeshon Holden again in the fourth quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Gabriel, Holden find each other for 2nd TD connection of the day) 2025/1/1 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ryan Day: 'Still a lot of football ahead' for OSU
videos.description: Ohio State coach Ryan Day says he's proud of the Buckeyes for their well-rounded Rose Bowl performance.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Interview (Ryan Day: 'Still a lot of football ahead' for OSU 2025/1/1
